english: The worship of Nanda Gopa's son gives all perfections
roman: Nanda gopa kumarasya bhajanam sarva siddhi dam

english: Nandakumar, Nandakumar, Nandakumar — salutations to you
Krishna son of Yashoda, Gopala, the sweet Lord
roman: Yashoda nandanam Krishnam Gopalam madhuram prabhum

english: Nandakumar, Nandakumar, Nandakumar — salutations to you
Bearer of the flute, Govinda, lord of the cosmos, the Master
roman: Murali dharam Govindam Brahmanda patim Ishwaram

english: Nandakumar, Nandakumar, Nandakumar — salutations to you
This Nandakumar Ashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Nandakumar ashtakam idam yah pathed bhakti samyutah

english: Becomes a recipient of the grace of Krishna lord of Gokul
